artifact.artifact_title: Migration Note: Scheduler Evidence Sufficiency for Artifact Non-Inferiority Experiments

claims.text: Goal 9 kept SchedulerClock as the deterministic semantic baseline for scheduler experiments.
Goal 9 did not build a daemon, sleep loop, wall-clock SLA, or production process supervisor.
Goal 9 paired DES and wall-clock smoke tests passed for due ordering, expiration, next-wake reporting, and restart frontier recovery.

artifact.conclusion: The scheduler evidence is insufficient to warrant continuation to artifact non-inferiority experiments due to the absence of production scheduler components.
declared_losses: No production scheduler features (daemon, SLA) are built or tested; only DES/wall-clock smoke tests passed.
artifact.recommended_action: Do not proceed with artifact non-inferiority experiments until a production scheduler with daemon, SLA, and process supervisor is implemented and tested.

declared_losses: No production scheduler features (daemon, SLA) are built or tested; only DES/wall-clock smoke tests passed.
carried_state.work_plan: Review the three scheduler evidence facts (des_baseline, wall_clock_probe_passed, production_scheduler_absent) to assess sufficiency for non-inferiority experiments, then draft the migration note.

declared_losses: No production scheduler features (daemon, SLA) are built or tested; only DES/wall-clock smoke tests passed.

messages.content: You are doing bounded event-loop work. Select the evidence needed for the artifact, but do not write the artifact yet. Return only JSON.

Return only one JSON object. Required fields: artifact_title string, task_id string, conclusion string, recommended_action string, claims array, declared_losses array, cited_record_ids array. Each claim must have fact_id, text, status, and evidence_record_ids. Use fact_id values from this set only: ['des_baseline', 'production_scheduler_absent', 'wall_clock_probe_passed'].
